original_image_tags: A scanned page of an "Office Memorandum · UNITED STATES GOVERNMENT" (Standard Form No. 64), dated October 9, 1950, from Mr. D. M. Ladd to the Director, regarding "FLYING SAUCERS / FLYING DISCS / GREEN FIREBALLS". The page contains typed text with a distribution list on the right side. There are multiple handwritten annotations, stamps, and file numbers at the bottom, including "162-83894-250" and "RECORDED - 105".

elements.description: A typed US Government Office Memorandum dated October 9, 1950, regarding 'FLYING SAUCERS FLYING DISCS GREEN FIREBALLS', featuring form headers, typed body text, a distribution checklist on the right, handwritten initials, and stamped dates and file numbers at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only typed text, handwritten annotations, and stamps/file numbers, with no photographs or diagrams present.
